title: Murder and vehicle theft suspect’s case postponed
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Sonwabile Mbambo (39), accused of the murder of Heleen Annandale (62), appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 22 September, for a formal bail application.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Sonwabile Mbambo (39), accused of the murder of Heleen Annandale (62), appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 22 September, for a formal bail application."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"However, the case was postponed to Friday 3 October owing to there not being enough time available for the court to get through the several bail applications it had intended to hear today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Instead, the court heard older cases and set postponement dates for the remaining bail applications.","html":"Instead, the court heard older cases and set postponement dates for the remaining bail applications."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbambo was arrested less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was discovered with a wound to the neck on Monday 1 September. Medical personnel declared her dead on the scene.","html":"Mbambo was arrested less than 48 hours after Annandale’s body was discovered with a wound to the neck on Monday 1 September. Medical personnel declared her dead on the scene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He is facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle, as Annandale’s abandoned car was discovered in KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He will remain in police custody until his next appearance.","html":"He will remain in police custody until his next appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld","Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Murder and vehicle theft suspect’s case postponed
